title: incorrect %Error: Selection index out of range

features.name: defparam override of module instantiation parameters
features.description: Code should include defparam statements that override module parameters at instantiation with different values for each instance

features.name: bit slice selection with parameter-computed range
features.description: Code should include a bit slice selection where both start and end indices are computed from module parameters

features.name: generate loop with genvar using parameter-computed bounds
features.description: Code should include a generate loop using genvar where loop bounds are computed from module parameters

features.name: multiple module instances with different defparam overrides
features.description: Code should include multiple instances of the same module where each instance has different defparam overrides for the same parameters
